hero.title: The night gets louder at Per's Food
hero.subtitle: A bold Japanese-night-market landing page with cinematic motion, layered cards, and a best-seller rail that slides with your scroll.
hero.panelOneTitle: We serve only what we believe in.
hero.panelOneBody: Dark lacquer, candlelight, and deliberate motion frame every moment.
hero.panelTwoBody: Seasonal layers arrive in a slow luxury rhythm built to impress.

bestSellers.title: Best sellers that steal the spotlight
bestSellers.subtitle: Scroll down to push the row sideways and reveal the kitchen's loudest favorites.

reserve.title: Book your night
reserve.contactSoon: We'll contact you shortly with the final details.
reserve.success: Your table awaits. We'll contact you shortly.

theme.title: Yakuza-inspired theme rules
theme.subtitle: The whole frontend leans into dark lacquer, crimson glow, and golden highlights so every panel feels like a neon alley scene.

footer.tagline: Bold plates, sharp motion, and a homepage built to impress the moment it loads.
footer.note: Serving the midnight crowd with style.
